title: linum alpinum var. provinciale
intro: Linum alpinum var. provinciale, also known as Alpine Flax or Provençal Flax, is a perennial plant species within the Linum genus, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Linum alpinum var. provinciale include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are commonly used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
